actor_claims.quote_text: On September 19, 2013, the Special Committee held an in-person meeting.
representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter
representatives from BofA Merrill Lynch and Goodwin Procter

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: BofA Merrill Lynch updated the Special Committee as to the current status of the revised indications of interest submitted by Party A, Party B and CSC/Pamplona
Representatives from Goodwin Procter again reviewed the Special Committee's fiduciary duties in the context of a sale of the company.
CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement
Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: committed to provide 100% of the capital required

bid_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share

Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.
On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share
CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer
together with the all-cash per share purchase price of $21.25, we refer to as the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona submitted a revised proposal at $20.75 per share and requested exclusive negotiations.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, CSC/Pamplona submitted a proposal for an all-cash purchase price of $20.75 per share, reiterating that Pamplona was committed to provide 100% of the capital required to consummate the transaction and requesting that CSC/Pamplona and Mac-Gray agree to engage in exclusive negotiations for two weeks.

event_claims.description: Party A reiterated that its prior $18.00 to $19.00 per share indication was its best and final offer.
event_claims.quote_text: Also on September 18, 2013, Party A reiterated in a telephone call to a representative of BofA Merrill Lynch that its previous indication of interest with an all-cash purchase price of $18.00 to $19.00 per share was its best and final offer.

event_claims.description: Party B submitted a revised indication of interest valued at $21.50 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 18, 2013, Party B also submitted a revised indication of interest with a purchase price that Party B valued at $21.50 per share, including $19.00 of cash to be paid at closing and the remaining per share price to be paid in the form of options to be issued to Mac-Gray stockholders

event_claims.description: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication.
event_claims.quote_text: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized the Transaction Committee to inform CSC/Pamplona that it would be prepared to move into exclusivity at $21.25 per share.
event_claims.quote_text: The Special Committee then authorized the Transaction Committee to inform CSC/Pamplona that the Special Committee would be prepared to move into exclusivity at a price of $21.25 per share

event_claims.description: CSC/Pamplona confirmed it would increase its all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as its last and best offer if Mac-Gray agreed to exclusivity.
event_claims.quote_text: Later that same day, the representative of CSC/Pamplona called the members of the Transaction Committee to confirm that CSC/Pamplona were willing to increase their all-cash purchase price to $21.25 per share as a last and best offer, provided that Mac-Gray agree to a two week period of exclusive negotiations.

event_claims.description: The Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement with exclusive negotiations until October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013 on the terms included in the CSC/Pamplona final proposal

event_claims.description: CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until October 12, 2013.
event_claims.quote_text: On September 24, 2013, CSC, Pamplona and Mac-Gray executed the exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013

event_claims.description: Pamplona committed to fund 100% of the capital needed for closing.
event_claims.quote_text: Pamplona was committing to fund 100% of the capital needed for closing

event_claims.description: Moab determined that it would not roll over any Moab shares in the transaction.
event_claims.quote_text: it was determined that Moab would not rollover any Moab shares in the transaction

participation_count_claims.quote_text: the Special Committee then discussed each of the three revised proposals
